title.ko: 적외선, 가시광선 또는 자외선의 강도, 속도, 스펙트럼, 편광 또는 위상 또는 펄스의 측정; 색의 측정; 방사온도측정
title.en: MEASUREMENT OF INTENSITY, VELOCITY, SPECTRAL CONTENT, POLARISATION, PHASE OR PULSE CHARACTERISTICS OF INFRARED, VISIBLE OR ULTRAVIOLET LIGHT; COLORIMETRY; RADIATION PYROMETRY

title.ko: 광측정, 예. 사진의 노출계(분광도 측정 G01J 3/00; 방사온도 측정에 특히 적합한 것 G01J 5/00)
title.en: Photometry, e.g. photographic exposure meter (spectrophotometry G01J0003000000;specially adapted for radiation pyrometry G01J0005000000)
Details
Optical or mechanical part
Restricting the angle of incident light
Arrangements of light sources specially adapted for photometry

title.ko: 참조광 또는 전기적 값과의 비교에 의한 것
title.en: by comparison with reference light or electric value

title.ko: 완전히 시각적 수단에 의한 것(G01J 1/20이 우선)
title.en: using wholly visual means (G01J0001200000 takes precedence)
using comparison with a surface of graded brightness

title.ko: 전기적인 방사선 검출기에 의한 것(G01J 1/20이 우선)
title.en: using electric radiation detectors (G01J0001200000 takes precedence)
using comparison with a reference electric value

title.ko: 측정값 또는 참조값의 강도가 동일한 검출기에 있어서의 효과가 동일하게 되도록 바꿀 수 있는 것, 예. 입사각의 변화에 의한 것
title.en: intensity of the measured or reference value being varied to equalise their effects at the detector, e.g. by varying incidence angle

title.ko: 광로중에 가변소자를 사용하는 것, 예. 필터, 편광수단(G01J 1/34가 우선)
title.en: using a variable element in the light-path, e.g. filter, polarising means (G01J0001340000 takes precedence)
using electric radiation detectors
adapted for automatic variation of the measured or reference value

title.ko: 광원의 강도 또는 거리의 변화에 의한 것(G01J 1/34가 우선)
title.en: using variation of intensity or distance of source (G01J0001340000 takes precedence)
using electric radiation detectors
adapted for automatic variation of the measured or reference value
using separate light-paths used alternately or sequentially, e.g. flicker
using electric radiation detectors

title.ko: 완전히 시각적 수단에 의한 것(G01J 1/10이 우선)
title.en: using wholly visual means (G01J0001100000 takes precedence)
using limit of visibility or extinction effect

title.ko: 전기적인 방사선 검출기에 의한 것(광학 및 기계부분 1/04; 참조 광 또는 전기적인 값과의 비교에 의한 것 G01J 1/10)
title.en: using electric radiation detectors (optical or mechanical part G01J0001040000;by comparison with a reference light or electric value G01J0001100000)
Electric circuits
using a capacitor
using chemical effects
using change in colour of an indicator, e.g. actinometer
using photographic effects
by observing photo-reactions between gases
using radiation pressure or radiometer effect
using luminescence generated by light
by measuring the pupil of the eye

title.ko: 분광측정; 분광광도측정; 모노크로미터 색의 측정
title.en: Spectrometry; Spectrophotometry; Monochromators; Measuring colours
Details
Slit arrangements
Scanning arrangements
Beam-switching arrangements
Arrangements of light sources specially adapted for spectrometry or colorimetry

title.ko: 스펙트럼의 발생; 모노크로미터
title.en: Generating the spectrum; Monochromators

title.ko: 굴절소자, 예. 프리즘에 의한 것(G01J 3/18, G01J 3/26이 우선)
title.en: using refracting elements, e.g. prism (G01J0003180000, G01J0003260000 take precedence)
with autocollimation
using diffraction elements, e.g. grating
Rowland circle spectrometers
Littrow mirror spectrometers
using gratings profiled to favour a specific order
using multiple reflection, e.g. Fabry-Perot interferometer, variable interference filter

title.ko: 스펙트럼의 조사(색필터를 사용하는 것 G01J 3/51)
title.en: Investigating the spectrum (using colour filters G01J0003510000)

title.ko: 스펙트럼상에서 직접 스퍽트럼 선 강도를 측정하는 것(3/42, 3/44가 우선)
title.en: Measuring the intensity of spectral lines directly on the spectrum itself (G01J0003420000, G01J0003440000 take precedence)
Investigating bands of a spectrum in sequence by a single detector
Investigating two or more bands of a spectrum by separate detectors

title.ko: 스펙트럼의 사진농도의 측정에 의해 스펙트럼선 강도의 측정; 분광사진(G01J 3/42, G01J 3/44가 우선)
title.en: Measuring the intensity of spectral lines by determining density of a photograph of the spectrum; Spectrography (G01J0003420000, G01J0003440000 take precedence)

title.ko: 흡수분광측정; 이중-빔 분광측정; 플리커 분광측정 반사 분광측정(광선 절환 장치의 구성 G01J 3/08)
title.en: Absorption spectrometry; Double-beam spectrometry; Flicker spectrometry; Reflection spectrometry (beam-switching arrangements G01J0003080000)
Dual wavelength spectrometry
Modulation spectrometry; Derivative spectrometry
Raman spectrometry; Scattering spectrometry
Emission spectrometry
Polarisation spectrometry
Interferometric spectrometry
by correlation of the amplitudes

title.ko: 상관 분광측정, 예. 스펙트럼 강도의 상관(3/453이 우선)
title.en: Correlation spectrometry, e.g. of the intensity (G01J0003453000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 색의 측정; 색 측정장치, 예. 비색계(색온도의 측정 5/60)
title.en: Measurement of colour; Colour measuring devices, e.g. colorimeters (measuring colour temperature G01J0005600000)
using electric radiation detectors
using colour filters
using colour charts

title.ko: 편광의 측정
title.en: Measuring polarisation of light
Polarimeters of separated-field type; Polarimeters of half-shadow type

title.ko: 전기적 검출수단을 이용하는 편광계(G01J 4/02가 우선)
title.en: Polarimeters using electric detection means (G01J0004020000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 방사온도계, 예. 적외선 또는 광학식 온도계
title.en: Radiation pyrometry, e.g. infrared or optical thermometry

title.ko: 구조적 세부
title.en: Constructional details
Arrangements for indicating or recording specially adapted for radiation pyrometers
Casings
Means for preventing contamination of the components of the optical system; Means for preventing obstruction of the radiation path

title.ko: 교란 방사선의 영향을 제거하기 위해 장치 감도 변화를 보상하기 위한 장치 (집광된 방사선의 입체각 조정을 위한 것 G01J5/07, 파장 선택을 위한 수단 G01J5/0801)
title.en: Arrangements for eliminating effects of disturbing radiation; Arrangements for compensating changes in sensitivity  (for adjusting of solid angle of collected radiation G01J0005070000; means for wavelength selection G01J0005080100)
by controlling the temperature of the apparatus or parts thereof, e.g. using cooling means or thermostats
by controlling parameters other than temperature

title.ko: 수집된 방사선의 입체각을 조정하기 위한 장치, 예. 시야 조정 또는 방향 지정, 위치 추적 또는 각도 위치 인코딩(광 시준 요소 G01J5/0806)

title.en: Calibration (using comparison with reference sources G01J0005520000)
Testing, inspecting or checking operation of radiation pyrometers
Measuring velocity of light

title.ko: 광학적 위상차의 측정; 응집성(coherence) 결정; 광학적 파장의 측정(분광측정 G01J 3/00)
title.en: Measuring optical phase difference; Determining degree of coherence; Measuring optical wavelength (spectrometry G01J0003000000)
by interferometric methods
by beating two waves of the same source but of different frequency and measuring the phase shift of the lower frequency obtained
Measuring the characteristics of individual optical pulses or of optical pulse trains
